description_long: This object is a large, upright wooden accordion with a rich, dark brown finish and metallic accents. The front features a full-length piano-style keyboard with white and black keys, flanked by decorative red and gold vertical panels. Above the keyboard, a complex array of metallic levers and rods is visible, suggesting a mechanical or player-piano mechanism. The sides are solid wood with horizontal metallic inlays, and the top is flat and broad, suitable for placing small items. The base includes two large foot pedals and additional red decorative panels. No visible brand or logo is present, and there are no visible straps or handles.
description: A large, upright wooden accordion with a piano-style keyboard, metallic levers, and decorative red panels. The exterior is dark brown wood with metallic accents and a flat top.
description_view_0: The back view shows a solid wooden panel with horizontal metallic inlays and no visible keys or mechanisms.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the depth of the wooden body, the edge of the keyboard, and the red decorative panel.
description_view_2: The front view displays the full piano keyboard, metallic levers, red decorative panels, and foot pedals.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the keyboard edge and red panel, with the wooden body extending backward.
